title: thymus membranaceus var. funkii
intro: Thymus membranaceus var. funkii, commonly known as Thymus funkii, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the Thymus genus. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, due to its high content of thymol, a compound with antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thymus membranaceus var. funkii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Thymus membranaceus var. funkii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
